vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Actuation: Motor pod dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path
Service: Equipment bay door opening mechanism

verify.value: All required fields are present and complete.

risk.desc: Potential access blockage due to complex internal geometry.
risk.mit: Implement additional access windows and clear labeling.

risk.desc: Risk of weak interface at motor mount due to insufficient fastener engagement.
risk.mit: Increase fastener engagement depth and use inserts.

risk.desc: Risk of tolerance mismatch between cooling inlet and motor pylon.
risk.mit: Review and adjust tolerance settings for both components.

risk.desc: Risk of process limitations affecting structural integrity of wing spar reinforcement.
risk.mit: Select appropriate material and process for reinforcement.

risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming structural capacity of cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Conduct additional analysis and testing of cooling inlet design.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP spar and EPP foam core.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and adjust foam/core interface design.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interface geometry.
risk.mit: Implement alignment aids and detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient load path continuity if ribs are not properly connected.
risk.mit: Ensure ribs are securely fastened to the main spar and carry-through.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.path_description: Load transfer from wing skin through ribs to main spar and then to fuselage frames
Thermal management through CFRP main spar and EPP foam core
Battery and payload bay access through wing spar

internal_feature_targets.description: Prevent rotational misalignment between spar halves

integration_opportunities.opportunity_description: Battery bay access through spar socket
Load transfer from ribs to main spar

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures aligned with printing axes
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual and dimensional inspection of all critical features

verification_focus.focus_description: Ensure total mass does not exceed 1000g
verification_focus.focus_target: Total mass of spar and ribs

verification_focus.focus_description: Verify bolted interfaces have correct clearance
Validate load transfer from ribs to spar
verification_focus.focus_target: Load path from ribs to spar

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of spar socket with wing spar may cause structural failure.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment during assembly and perform rigorous quality checks.

risk.desc: Improper formation of control surface hinge line may restrict control surface movement.
risk.mit: Review and validate hinge line geometry during design phase and verify during manufacturing.

risk.desc: Inadequate fit of rib flange to wing skin interface may lead to structural integrity issues.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough fit checks and adjust as necessary during assembly.

risk.desc: Lightening pockets may compromise structural strength if not designed properly.
risk.mit: Perform finite element analysis to ensure structural integrity with lightening pockets.

risk.desc: Wiring harness may be damaged if harness pass-through is not properly designed.
risk.mit: Ensure proper clearance and routing of wiring harness during design and assembly.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wing root to spar via rib
Solar radiation heats rib surface, transferred to air or dissipated
Control surface movement pivots at rib hinge
Wiring harness passes through rib for control surface actuation

internal_feature_targets.description: NACA airfoil profile for optimal lift
Hinge line for control surface actuation

integration_opportunities.description: Ensure rib spar aligns with wing root spar
Control surface cutout and hinge line must match control surface design
Rib flange must fit wing skin interface

verification_focus.description: Verify spar socket aligns with wing spar
Verify control surface hinge line is properly formed
Verify rib flange fits wing skin interface
Verify lightening pocket reduces weight without compromising strength
Verify harness pass-through allows wiring harness to pass through without damage

risk.mit: Design access cover to be easily removable and provide adequate access for inspection and maintenance.

From connector_keying to wing spar via harness_raceway for sensor and actuator data flow
From service_hatch to harness_raceway for maintenance access
